zh.lifeSummary: 當William Goodrich於大約1545年出生在英國素福爾可費爾申馬時，他的父親Robert Goodrich31歲，母親Elizabeth23歲。他於1568年11月7日與Margaret Fanny Richardson在英國素福爾可費爾申馬結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1631年10月24日在英國英格蘭素福爾可賀瑟特享年87歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可賀瑟特。

nameMeanings.name: Goodrich
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Goderiche, Old English Gōdrīc, composed of the elements gōd ‘good’ + rīc ‘power’.
English: habitational name from Goodrich (Herefordshire), a shortened form for ‘castle Goodrich’, which takes its name from Godric Mapson, a holder of the estate recorded in the Domesday Book.
Americanized form of German Güttrich, cognate with 1 above.

variants.name: Goodrick
meanings: English (Yorkshire and Lincolnshire): variant of   Goodrich  .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When William Goodrich was born about 1545, in Felsham, Suffolk, England, his father, Robert Goodrich, was 31 and his mother, Elizabeth, was 23. He married Margaret Fanny Richardson on 7 November 1568, in Felsham, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 24 October 1631, in Hessett, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 87, and was buried in Hessett, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Goodrich est né environ 1545, à Felsham, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Robert Goodrich, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Fanny Richardson le 7 novembre 1568, à Felsham, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 24 octobre 1631, à Hessett, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 87 ans, et a été enterré à Hessett, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Lui sposato Margaret Fanny Richardson il 7 novembre 1568, nel Felsham, Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. ko.lifeSummary: William Goodrich(이)가 대략 1545년 영국 수폴크 프샤에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Goodrich(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1568년 11월 7일 영국 수폴크 프샤에서 Margaret Fanny Richardson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1631년 10월 24일 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 헤싯에서 87세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 헤싯에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Goodrich nasceu aproximadamente 1545, em Felsham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Goodrich, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Fanny Richardson em 7 de novembro de 1568, em Felsham, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 24 de outubro de 1631, em Hessett, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 87 anos, e foi sepultado em Hessett, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Goodrich родился около 1545 г. в местности фелшам, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert Goodrich было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Fanny Richardson 7 ноября 1568 г. в местности фелшам, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 24 октября 1631 г. в местности хессетт, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 87 лет и был похоронен в местности хессетт, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.
